data.summary: Passive-monitor episode under subscribe_pr_activity on sproutlab PR #4 + #5 following cipher-02 combined approvals. Verified PR #4 r4 (2566d55) as pure comment-only over r3 — semantic-note expansion on _syncPendingByKey per nit 2 option (b), zero executable change. Verified PR #5 force-push (3dbe32b → 8799df4) as rebase-only onto sl-1-2 r4; badge code byte-identical to approved head. Posted approval-forwards acknowledgments on both PRs so Sovereign had unambiguous merge signal at moved heads. On #4 merge, detected #5 post-squash mergeable_state=dirty (additions jumped 108→407, commits 1→6) — classic stacked-PR / squash-merge rebase gap; posted one-line remedy (git rebase --onto origin/main 2566d55) + approval-forwards clause tied to content-equivalent diff. Both PRs subsequently merged by Sovereign.
decisions: Approval on PR #4 forwards from r3 (cd1d4d1) to r4 (2566d55). Verified comment-only: single hunk in split/sync.js expanding the trailing inline comment on _syncPendingByKey into a multi-paragraph semantic note; initialization preserved; control flow identical.

Approval on PR #5 forwards from 3dbe32b to 8799df4. Verified rebase-only: diff vs approved head is exactly the r4 comment block propagated through rebased history; badge code (template.html, styles.css, _syncUpdateOfflineBadge in sync.js) byte-identical.

Flagged PR #5 dirty-state post-#4-merge with rebase remedy and approval-forwards clause. Not a review concern; routine stacked-PR housekeeping surfaced proactively so Sovereign didn't attempt merge-into-dirty.
Unsubscribed automatically on both merges. Phase 1 sync-visibility stack (sl-1-1 audit → sl-1-2 indicator → sl-1-3 offline badge) ships to main.

Doctrine-candidate (ACK-primitives pattern) is now validated IN MERGED CODE — not just an approval, a shipped artifact. Aurelius Hour-12 Chronicle promotion has the strongest possible evidence base: code on main.
data.handoff: Phase 1 sync-visibility code shipped to main (sl-1-2 as d8743c8; sl-1-3 as e931a08). Doctrine-candidate (ACK-primitives pattern) now validated in merged code — strongest possible evidence arc for Hour-12 Chronicle promotion. sl-1-1 r2 still pending Cipher re-review.
